---
name: Request a landlord / source
about: Ask for a landlord or platform to be covered
title: "[request] <landlord or platform name>"
labels: source-request
---

**Landlord or platform**
(name)

**Their listings page**
(the URL where they show their own available apartments)

**City**
(NYC is the current focus, but note it if elsewhere — platform adapters often port nationally)

**Anything you know about how they publish listings?**
(optional: is it their own site, a RentCafe/AppFolio portal, a PDF, etc.)
